# Reclaim Protocol

> Reclaim Protocol enables privacy-preserving verification of user data from any website using zero-knowledge proofs over TLS (zkTLS). Verify facts about users without collecting sensitive documents or credentials.

Reclaim Protocol supports 2500+ data sources and provides SDKs for web, mobile, and 15+ blockchains.

## Docs

- [Introduction](https://docs.reclaimprotocol.org/index.md)
- [Get an API Key](https://docs.reclaimprotocol.org/api-key.md)
- [Understanding the Tech](https://docs.reclaimprotocol.org/understanding-the-tech.md)
